## Summary / 摘要

-

## Change Type / 修改类型

- [ ] New skill / 新增 Skill
- [ ] Skill update / 更新 Skill
- [ ] Documentation / 文档
- [ ] Visual assets / 视觉资产
- [ ] Validation or tooling / 校验或工具

## Bilingual Check / 双语检查

- [ ] English content updated where needed / 已按需更新英文内容
- [ ] Chinese content updated where needed / 已按需更新中文内容
- [ ] `catalog/skills.json` updated if skills changed / 如 Skill 变化，已更新 catalog

## Safety Check / 安全检查

- [ ] No private data, secrets, tokens, or private transcripts / 不包含私人数据、密钥、token 或私人对话原文
- [ ] Examples use fictional or generic data / 示例使用虚构或通用数据
- [ ] Boundaries and risks are documented / 已说明边界和风险

## Validation / 校验

- [ ] `bash scripts/validate_structure.sh` passes locally / 本地校验通过
